required_preferences.fact: Prefers hybrid involvement with her women-in-tech group—actively participates online when unable to attend in-person due to increased solo responsibilities at home

supersedes.fact: Prefer in-person meetups with her women-in-tech group—rarely participates in online events unless required

required_preferences.fact: Visits major local art exhibitions solo or with friends—coordinates major LA exhibitions with her partner when possible

supersedes.fact: Attends local art openings with her partner monthly—never misses a major exhibition in the city

required_preferences.fact: Makes space for her brother to use the home office for his remote work—temporarily shifts her morning meditation routine to the bedroom while he's staying
Replies to personal texts within the day—never leaves friends or family unread for more than 24 hours
Reduces attendance at social events and meetups, declining invitations except for brief check-ins with her closest friends or essential community group responsibilities
Chooses new novel genres for book club every month—never rereads past selections

persona: A 38-year-old software architect with a background in machine learning
